pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 25-29 download: commons-lang3-3.12.0.jar, junit-4.13.2.jar, hamcrest-core-1.3.jar from Maven Central. Maven artifact IDs verified via https://search.maven.org and https://mvnrepository.com. JUnit 4.13.2 dependency on hamcrest-core confirmed via https://junit.org/junit4/dependencies.html

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Java project named 'LegacyInventory' located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/LegacyInventory. Upon successful compilation, the main class file will be at out/production/LegacyInventory/com/inventory/Main.class. The project downloads real libraries from Maven Central: commons-lang3 version 3.12.0, junit version 4.13.2, and hamcrest-core version 1.3. The metadata incorrectly lists the third library as 'hamcrest' when the actual Maven artifact ID is 'hamcrest-core'.
